articles.author: Julie Bort
articles.title: Anthropic’s latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests - TechCrunch
articles.description: Anthropic's popularity with business users is growing so well that the latest beef with the government might actually boost it, data from Ramp suggests.
articles.content:
Anthropic is having a month. 
The AI lab finished May by surpassing OpenAI in market share of business spending for the first time, Ramp just revealed. It raised $65 billion at a $965 billion valuat… [+3871 chars]

articles.title: Trump admin helps xAI fight pollution lawsuit, says military needs Grok for war - Ars Technica
articles.description: NAACP lawsuit says xAI uses gas turbines without permits for Grok data center.
